name: Brim hf.
summary: Brim hf. operates as a seafood company in Iceland. It processes and sells various seafood products that include ground fish, pelagic fish, deep sea redfish, golden redfish, haddock, cod, saithe, greenland halibut, lumpfish, capelin, herring, blue whiting, silver smelt, and Atlantic mackerel, as well as various other species. The company also processes trimmings of capelin, herring, blue whiting, and mackerel; and provides fishmeal and dried fish products, as well as various types of products processed from roe. It offers its products primarily in Europe, Asia, and North America. The company was formerly known as HB Grandi hf. And changed its name to Brim hf. in August 2019. Brim hf. is based in Reykjavik, Iceland.
